C

ClusterInteractionManager 中控仪表互联管理类
提供app向仪表发送数据的能力，及接收仪表返回的数据 
ClusterInteractionManager.IDataReceivedListener 中控仪表互联数据回调监听器

DebugLogger  
DeviceManager This is class that extends ManagerBase. 

I

InputManager 方控硬按键服务接口 
InputManager.CUSTOMKEY_FUNCTION  
InputManager.onEventListener 长按键状态的回调 
InputManager.onKeyListener 按键状态的回调 
InputManager.SCENE_MODE  
InputManager.SCENE_SWITCH  

M

ManagerBase This is the base class for the manager classes each manager map to each service (N->N) 

P

PowerManager This is a sample manager class that extends ManagerBase 
PowerManager.BRIGHTNESS_MODE_TYPE  
PowerManager.DISPLAY_INFO_TYPE 显示信息类型枚举（String 类型限定） 对应：高度、温度、宽度、正弦、余弦、正切

PowerManager.MODULE_ID

PowerManager.THEME_MODE_TYPE  
PowerManager.TIME_MODULE_TYPE  
PrivPermissionManager  
PrivPermissionManager.IAppOpNotedListener AppOps 应用访问行为监听器 数据合规敏感动作 对原生AppOpsManager接口的封装 
PrivPermissionManager.IPriPermListener 授权状态监听器 
PrivPermissionManager.PermState 隐私权限许可状态 

T

TboxManager  
TboxManager.ITboxCallListener ITboxCallListener 查询TBOX BEI-Call回调监听器ERROR(/TboxManager#addTBoxCallListener(ITboxCallListener)) 
TboxManager.ITboxInfoListener ITboxInfoListener 查询TBOX固定信息回调监听器 TboxManager.addTBoxInfoListener(ITboxInfoListener) 
TboxManager.ITboxStateListener ITboxStateListener 状态类消息回调监听器 TboxManager.addTBoxStateListener(ITboxStateListener)
